Our Story

A Tropical Sanctuary Nestled in Nature

New Kahuna Cabanas offers an authentic Sri Lankan escape, where traditional wooden architecture meets the serenity of a lush tropical garden. Unwind in one of our six unique cabanas, each crafted with character and care — just steps away from the glistening shores of Unawatuna.

📍 Unawatuna, Galle, Sri Lanka

Visual Tour

Glimpses of Paradise

Accommodation

Our Cabanas & Rooms

Each space is uniquely designed with warm wooden interiors, handcrafted details, and the soothing ambiance of tropical nature surrounding you.

Garden Cabana – Double

Cosy wooden cabana with a double bed, private veranda, and lush garden views. Perfect for couples.

Double Bed Garden View Veranda

Round Roof Cabana

Distinctive circular-roofed cabana with rich wood details, dressing area, and an intimate tropical feel.

Round Ceiling Dressing Area Wooden Floor

Nature View Cabana

Wake up to birdsong and tropical greenery. A tranquil retreat nestled among swaying palms and ancient trees.

Nature View Queen Bed Private Entry

Why Choose Us

An Experience Beyond Stay

🏖️

Beach Proximity

Just a 100-metre stroll to the golden shores of Unawatuna — one of Sri Lanka's most loved beaches.

🌿

Tropical Garden

Set within a lush, shaded garden full of coconut palms, tropical trees and birdsong.

💳

Pay After Stay

No advance payment needed. Stay first, pay after — we trust our guests completely.

🌅

Peaceful Atmosphere

Away from the bustle — a serene hideaway for relaxation and genuine Sri Lankan hospitality.
